name: Vietnamese Đồng
description: The Vietnamese Đồng is one of the world's lowest-valued currency units. Vietnam has become a major manufacturing hub and one of Asia's fastest-growing economies.
historicalNotes: The current đồng was unified after North and South Vietnam merged in 1978. Vietnam's Đổi Mới economic reforms since 1986 transformed it from a centrally planned to a market-oriented economy.
